name: michael tarvin
body: Thankful all of you are okay! Praying for some good helping hands and provision for any damages. ❤️

name: Chuck N Lori W
body: Oh my! Keeping you in prayer!

name: Judy Nichols
body: Oh my goodness! Praise God you are all safe. Praying for His grace and provision as you navigate this.

name: Julie Hickman
body: Oh my heavens. This is unbelievable. But I don’t consider it strange that no one was home. Clearly that was the hand of God protecting all of you . You have a home with us …we have three empty bedrooms. Uncle Paul and Aunt Julie
